vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

physics_paths.path: Rotor thrust loads routed through spar into fuselage spine
Airflow over wing surface for lift generation
Heat dissipation from wing skin and spar
Wing flexure and vibration under flight loads
Power and signal routing through harnesses to wing-mounted components
Access for maintenance and inspection of wing components

integration_opportunities.opportunity: Integrate spar_socket for fuselage spine connection
Integrate gear_leg for landing gear connection

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: H7/h6 fit class for bolted connections
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures for FDM, tooling pins for CNC
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CMM for dimensional checks, visual for fit

verification_focus.focus: Fixture points for wing spar and ruddervator
Heat dissipation from wing skin and spar

risk.desc: Potential salt-fog corrosion on aluminum parts in maritime surveillance variant.
risk.mit: Apply anodizing or other salt-fog resistant coating to aluminum components.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion mismatch between CFRP and aluminum materials may cause stress.
risk.mit: Design with thermal expansion joints or use materials with similar expansion coefficients.

risk.desc: Cooling channel design may not be sufficient for high power motor operation.
risk.mit: Conduct CFD analysis to validate cooling performance and optimize channel design.

risk.desc: Servo and motor replacement may be difficult due to tight assembly.
risk.mit: Ensure access covers are designed for easy removal and add quick-release mechanisms.

risk.desc: Potential for misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum instructions.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

physics_paths.path: Rotor thrust loads are transferred through the tilt axis to the wing spar.
Cooling airflow from the rotor wash passes through the nacelle to dissipate heat from the motor and ESC.
Thermal energy from the motor and ESC is conducted to the nacelle structure and radiated to the environment.
The tilt axis allows the nacelle to rotate from 0 to 90 degrees for VTOL transition.
Power and data cables from the fuselage are routed through the nacelle to the motor and ESC.

integration_opportunities.opportunity: Integrate a thermal sensor in the cooling channel to monitor motor and ESC temperature.
Add a quick-release mechanism to the access cover for easier maintenance.

manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures designed to minimize material waste and improve print quality.
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Non-destructive testing (NDT) for structural integrity and dimensional accuracy.

verification_focus.focus: Mechanical integrity of the tilt axis and bearing seat under dynamic loads.
Thermal performance of the cooling channel.
Electrical connectivity and signal integrity of the power and data cables.

generated_parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
generated_parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

requirements: Design a tilt servo linkage system for a VTOL hybrid with a tilt range of 0-93deg.
Include a DS3218 servo, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, and crash-tolerant design.
Materials: CFRP + Al + TPU, processes: FDM + CNC.
Design must be salt-fog resistant and include flotation-equipped landing gear.
Ensure crash tolerance and serviceability for maintenance.

risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat sinks and thermal barriers.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate clearance for nacelle rotation.
risk.mit: Ensure clearance arc is designed with sufficient tolerance.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient access for maintenance and replacement of servo.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access cover.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to high loads from rotor thrust.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and reinforce critical load-bearing components.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of datum reference.
risk.mit: Define a primary datum feature and ensure all components are aligned to it.
